---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with specwright or a bundled companion
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["bug"]
---

## Component affected

The `sw` skill, a bundled companion (`sw-brainstorming`, `sw-writing-plans`, `sw-new-pr`, `sw-code-review`, `sw-update`), or a `/sw:*` command.

## Agent and version

Which agent runtime you used and its version (e.g. Claude Code 2.1.123, Codex CLI, Cursor 0.42, OpenCode, etc.) plus the operating system.

## Reproduction steps

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual behavior

What did happen. Include any error message verbatim, the relevant tool calls if you can identify them, and a screenshot or log snippet if useful.

## Anything else

Additional context, related issues, or a hypothesis about the cause.
